entries.title: Ephraim the Syrian on Genesis 7
entries.excerpt: When men did not repent — though Noah by his holiness served as a model for his contemporaries, and by his righteousness for a hundred whole years preached to them about the Flood, and they even mocked Noah when he announced to them that all kinds of living creatures would come to him to seek salvation in the ark, and they said, “How shall the beasts and birds come, scattered as they are throughout all lands?” — then God repeated again to him: “Come thou and all thy house into the ark; for thee have I seen righteous before me in this generation.…
